?

Function re_space_view::external::re_data_store::external::arrow2::compute::arity::binary_with_bitmap

pub fn binary_with_bitmap<T, D, F>(
    lhs: &PrimitiveArray<T>,
    rhs: &PrimitiveArray<D>,
    data_type: DataType,
    op: F
) -> (PrimitiveArray<T>, Bitmap)
where
    T: NativeType,
    D: NativeType,
    F: Fn(T, D) -> (T, bool),
Expand description

Version of binary that returns an array and bitmap. Used when working with overflowing operations
